title: Find Grandma’s Pictures
ticket: Grandma says her pictures 'disappeared from the Google'.
tooltip: Downloads is where files from the internet usually go.
whyItMatters: Users often confuse browser and file system.
careerConnection: IT helps users locate downloaded files constantly.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Which folder usually holds downloaded files?
interactiveDemo.hint: Browsers usually send files to one default folder.

breakFixTask: vacation.jpg is in Desktop. Move it to Pictures.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without hints?

translationTerms.plain: Where files from the internet go.
